creator: pscott@the-frontier.org
text:
After installing StarOffice52 port it is not possible to browse Web
sites, use ftp, or register the product using Help->Registration...
In short, any external site is inaccessible. However, ftp and http
sessions on the local machine work perfectly.

It is noteworthy to add that all routing and networking is working
perfectly in all other cases. In fact, machines on an intranet network
interface card easily access the Internet via natd over a second 
network interface card. Also, all applications running locally can
easily access the Intranet and the Internet over their respective
NIC adapters. It is only StarOffice, running locally, that fails with
non-local connections.

A tcpdump on the external (Internet) interface shows a normal TCP/IP
session establishment, but no further traffic flows. If the "Stop"
icon is clicked after some arbitrary time, a normal TCP/IP close
session is completed. Between session establishment and session closure
no packets flow over the connection.

20:39:57.393305 ns1.the-frontier.org.4994 > www.sun.com.http: S 1489777480:1489777480(0) win 16384 <mss 1460> (DF)
20:39:57.455764 www.sun.com.http > ns1.the-frontier.org.4994: S 422400000:422400000(0) ack 1489777481 win 64240 <mss 1460>
20:39:57.456123 ns1.the-frontier.org.4994 > www.sun.com.http: . ack 1 win 17520 (DF)

20:40:27.514122 www.sun.com.http > ns1.the-frontier.org.4994: F 1:1(0) ack 1 win 64240
20:40:27.514401 ns1.the-frontier.org.4994 > www.sun.com.http: . ack 2 win 17520 (DF)
20:40:52.074997 ns1.the-frontier.org.4994 > www.sun.com.http: F 1:1(0) ack 2 win 17520 (DF)
20:40:52.137481 www.sun.com.http > ns1.the-frontier.org.4994: . ack 2 win 64240

How-To-Repeat: Install StarOffice52.
start tcpdump on Internet NIC adapter
Pull down Help menu and select Registration...
Program hangs. 
After some time, click on red "stop" icon
stop tcpdump
